news.title: Rebuilt from the ground up
news.body: New tools for score planning, the Great Vault, Dawncrest upgrades, and PvP goals. Character lookups and score data come live from raider.io.

news.title: Midnight Season 1 is live
news.body: Eight-dungeon pool, the new Dawncrest upgrade system, and Xal'atath's Bargain weekly affixes. Keystone Legend sits at 3000 again.
